description: Detects excessive includes and functions with too many parameters in C. Simplified from Rust: flags all preproc_include directives without counting against threshold (>15) and flags all function parameter_list nodes without counting against threshold (>5). Languages scoped to c only.

flag.message: #include directive detected -- verify the total count does not exceed 15. Files with many includes have high coupling and should be split or use forward declarations to reduce dependencies.
